summary: Added STEP 0.5 to /pr command for PR READY review tasks: detects pr_ready status + sources array, commits/pushes changes, posts GitHub PR comment via gh pr comment --body-file, optionally sends Zulip message via zulip-send with ~/.zuliprc placeholder detection, then transitions task to [COMPLETED] via update-task-status.sh postflight.

artifacts.summary: Implementation summary for task 725 documenting STEP 0.5 addition to pr.md
Modified pr.md with ~390 lines of STEP 0.5 (sub-steps 0.5.1-0.5.7)
